chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-981 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 01-10-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
